columns.name: dem_sap
columns.label: SAP/NHC
columns.description: SAP code associated with the patient.

columns.name: metbiopsy_id
columns.label: Biopsy ID
columns.description: Records the specific laboratory or institutional code uniquely identifying a tissue sample obtained via biopsy across all solid tumors, enabling precise sample tracking, molecular analysis correlation, and biobanking linkage in precision oncology workflows.

columns.name: metbiopsy_site
columns.label: Biopsy site
columns.description: Specifies the precise anatomical location from which the biopsy tissue sample was obtained.

columns.name: metbiopsy_site_other
columns.label: Other Biopsy site
columns.description: Free-text field to document precise anatomical locations from which biopsy tissue samples were obtained across all solid tumors not covered by standard checkbox options.

columns.name: metbiopsy_date
columns.label: Collection date
columns.description: Records the exact date when the biopsy tissue sample was physically collected from the patient.
